DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAY-20-2021 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT PETER BRESLER'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES AND FOR SANCTIONS, PLAINTIFF DOES NOT STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE MATTER IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 4, 2021 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302, LAW & MOTION (UNDER LEAD CASE NO. CGC-20-584310 - STUDER V. BRESLER). THE JUDGE PRO TEM TO PREPARE A REPORT AND RECOMMENDATION. (SEE MINI-MINUTES FOR COMPLETE DETAILS.) JUDGE PRO TEM: ROBERT KANE; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Answers To Interrogatories And For Sanctions (Part 2 Of 2 For Purposes Of Entry Of Tentative Ruling)
Off Calendar May-20-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Answers To Interrogatories And For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-20-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. MARK B. ABELSON, Esq. of Campagnoli, Abelson & Campagnoli (Tel: 415-421-1515) for plaintiff Dirk Neyhart;
Atty. PETER BRESLER, Esq. of Law Offices of Bresler and Lee (Tel: 415-776-7177) representing himself as a defendant in pro per.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT PETER BRESLER's Motion To Compel Further Answers To Interrogatories And For Sanctions.

Plaintiff does not stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem.

Matter discussed.

The matter is continued to June 4, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion (under lead case no. CGC-20-584310 - Studer v. Bresler).

The Judge Pro Tem to prepare a report and recommendation.

The Judge Pro Tem and parties will conduct a further conference with parties on May 26, 2021 at 1:00 p.m. Plaintiff's counsel to circulate a Zoom invitation to the Judge Pro Tem and the parties.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
